text:
Muztarib
rakhta hai mera dil-e-betaab mujhe
Ain
hasti hai tarap soorat-e-seemab mujhe
Mauj
hai naam mera, behr hai payaab mujhe
Ho
na zanjeer kabhi halqa-e-girdab mujhe
Aab
mein misl-e-hawa jaata hai tausan mera
Khaar
maahi se na atka kabhi daaman mera
Mein
uchhalti hoon kabhi jazb-e-mah-e-kaamil se
Josh
mein sar ko patakti hoon kabhi saahil se
Hoon
woh rehro ke mohabbat hai mujhe manzil se
Kyun
tarapti hoon, yeh poochhe koi mere dil se
Zehmat
tangi-e-darya se garezaan hoon mein
Vus'at
behr ki furqat mein pareshan hoon mein
